raw_text:
WARNING [TC-F-002] interface.f90:6 <-> header.h:2  param[0] 'a'
  COLUMN_ROW_MAJOR: Fortran 2D array a(m,n) is column-major.
  C 2D array a[m][n] is row-major. Element a(i,j) in Fortran = a[j-1][i-1]
  in C. If C code iterates a[i][j], it reads the TRANSPOSE of the Fortran
  matrix. Silent wrong results in any matrix computation.

NOTE: Either transpose on entry/exit, use LAPACK's leading-dimension
      convention (treat as 1D flat array with stride), or document that
      C caller must use column-major indexing (a[j][i]).
